days.text: Cloudy. Occasional showers. Possible thunderstorms. Force 4 to 6 east to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Slight flooding will occur in Inner Harbour area from 8 am ~ 12 pm due to astronomical tide. Cloudy. Occasional showers. Possible thunderstorms at first. Force 3 to 5 southeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers at first. Force 2 to 4 southerly winds.
